prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约7175→8038→7375→8902→6822，整体呈波动走势，2025年位次（约6822名）为近5年最优，较2024年大幅前移约2080名，显示当年报 考热度明显回升；该校在黑龙江省物理类招生计划2021–2025年分别为47、47、45、45、42人，呈逐步缩减趋势；2026年计划40人，较2025年再减2人，缩 招约4.8%，计划持续收紧对竞争有一定加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 苏州大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年稳定在约第43–46名（2026年约第46名），属全国百 强中上游水平，综合实力较强；2024年声誉评价偏正面（食堂改善），2026年声誉评价偏负面（校园安全事件）；抖音热度为较热（总排名第46位），短视频曝 光量中等偏上，报考关注度一般。未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，苏州大学A-及以上学科有体育学（A-）、药学（A-），与该校招生专业中的药学 、体育类等有一定关联，但整体优势学科数量较少。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与苏州大学物理类招生专业（ 计算机、电子信息、电气、临床医学等）匹配度较高，相关专业热度对报考有正向拉动；黑龙江省2026年考生总数约16.7万人，较2025年（物理类11.7万+历史类5.5 万≈17.2万）略有下降，竞争压力小幅缓解；苏州大学位于江苏省苏州市，属长三角经济发达地区，对黑龙江省考生有一 定跨省吸引力；该校在黑龙江省招生占比约2.5%–3%，属中等偏低水平，地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的强势表现、2026年招生计划持续 缩招（约4.8%）、工科专业热度较高以及考生总数略有下降等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年6822名基础上略有后移（竞争略加剧）。预测最低位次约6677名，区间61 77–7177名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated: approximately 7175 → 8038 → 7375 → 8902 → 6822, showing an overall volatile trend. The 2025 ranking (about 6822) was the best in the past five years, significantly moving forward by about 2080 positions compared to 2024, indicating a notable rebound in application popularity. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Heilongjiang Province from 2021 to 2025 was 47, 47, 45, 45, and 42 students respectively, showing a gradual reduction trend. The 2026 plan is 40 students, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a reduction of about 4.8%, and the continued tightening of the plan will intensify competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science main ranking has been stable at around 43rd to 46th in recent years (about 46th in 2026), placing it in the upper-middle level of the national top 100, with relatively strong comprehensive strength. The reputation evaluation in 2024 was somewhat positive (improved cafeteria), while in 2026 it was somewhat negative (campus safety incidents). Douyin popularity is relatively high (ranked 46th overall), with medium to high short video exposure, and application attention is average. No obvious admission cutoff gaps were recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Soochow University had A- or above disciplines including Sports Science (A-) and Pharmacy (A-), which are somewhat related to the university's enrollment majors such as Pharmacy and Sports, but the overall number of advantageous disciplines is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, which aligns well with Soochow University's Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, etc.), and the popularity of related majors positively drives applications. The total number of examinees in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 is about 167,000, a slight decrease from 2025 (Physics Category 117,000 + History Category 55,000 ≈ 172,000), slightly easing competition pressure. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province, in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has some cross-provincial appeal to Heilongjiang examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang Province is about 2.5%–3%, which is moderately low, and regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong performance of the significant ranking advancement in 2025, the continued reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (about 4.8%), the high popularity of engineering majors, and the slight decrease in the total number of examinees, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move back from the 2025 ranking of 6822 (competition slightly intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is about 6677, with a range of 6177–7177.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (6177–7177), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine 5+3, Computer Science, etc.) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<6177), you can focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>7177), you should prioritize Tier 3 majors as backups and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated from approximately 801 to 1198 to 811 to 1477 to 1333, showing an overall trend of shifting backward. The 2024 ranking (approximately 1477) was the lowest in the past five years, while the 2025 ranking recovered to about 1333, indicating some recovery but not returning to the 2021–2023 levels. The enrollment plan for History Category in Heilongjiang Province from 2021 to 2025 was 8, 8, 10, 10, and 13 students respectively, showing a gradual expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 15 students, an increase of 2 students compared to 2025, an expansion of about 15.4%, and the continued relaxation of the plan has a certain alleviating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science main ranking has been stable at around 43rd to 46th in recent years (approximately 46th in 2026), placing it in the upper-middle tier of the national top 100, with relatively strong comprehensive strength. The 2024 reputation evaluation was somewhat positive (cafeteria improvement), while the 2026 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (campus safety incidents). Douyin popularity is relatively hot (overall ranking 46th), short video exposure is moderately high, and application attention is average. No obvious enrollment gaps were recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Soochow University's A- and above disciplines include Physical Education (A-) and Pharmacy (A-), which have low direct relevance to History Category majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism, etc.), and the advantageous disciplines have limited pull on liberal arts major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature have relatively high social popularity (Law recommended, Chinese Language/Literature recommended), which has a certain positive effect on History Category applications. The total number of examinees in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 is approximately 167,000, with an estimated History Category of about 52,000 based on recent proportions, a slight decrease from 2025 (55,000), leading to a slight easing of competitive pressure. Soochow University is located in Suzhou City, Jiangsu Province, in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has a certain cross-provincial appeal to Heilongjiang examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang Province is about 2.5%–3%, which is moderately low, and regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the recovery trend of rankings in 2025, the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (about 15.4%), the relatively high popularity of liberal arts majors, and the slight decrease in the total number of examinees, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will shift slightly backward from the 2025 ranking of 1333 (competition slightly eases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1436, with a range of 1178–1694.
